constraints: L4-L5 disc herniation — no heavy axial spinal loading, no spinal flexion under load, avoid Valsalva
high blood pressure (stage 1 hypertension) — moderate intensity only, avoid prolonged isometric holds

machine_settings.Seated Row: Seat 3, Chest pad to comfortable reach

notes: 55yo construction manager. L4-L5 disc herniation from 2024 work injury, now stable and cleared for training with modifications. Hypertension managed with amlodipine. No barbell squatting or deadlifting — spine must be unloaded for all hinge patterns (cable hip hinge, machine only). Core stability is priority. Needs constant reminder to breathe and avoid holding breath. Sees me biweekly.
